message:
chore: bump version to 1.3.0 for release

Highlights since 1.2.1:
- feat: commit-sweep command for grouping dirty worktrees into logical commits
- feat: fork management commands (fork-status, fork-sync, fork-clean) with full arg parsing
- fix: JSON injection in status, destructive reset in fork_clean
- test: 55 new unit tests for parsing/resolution; review-policy + e2e migration to test_e2e_framework.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ fi
 #==============================================================================
 
 # Version: read from VERSION file, fallback to embedded
-VERSION="1.2.1"
+VERSION="1.3.0"
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION" ]]; then
     VERSION="$(cat "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION")"
